allow: PowerShell($pids = \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8080 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).OwningProcess | Select-Object -Unique; foreach \($p in $pids\) { Stop-Process -Id $p -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; Set-Location "K:\\WORK_FILE\\مشروع التخرج 2\\المشروع\\nabil\\artifacts\\api-server"; Start-Process -FilePath "pnpm" -ArgumentList "run","start" -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8080/api/dashboard/summary" -UseBasicParsing\).Content)

PowerShell($pids = \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8080 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).OwningProcess | Select-Object -Unique; foreach \($p in $pids\) { Stop-Process -Id $p -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; Set-Location "K:\\WORK_FILE\\مشروع التخرج 2\\المشروع\\nabil\\artifacts\\api-server"; Start-Process -FilePath "pnpm" -ArgumentList "run","start" -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8080/api/dashboard/summary" -UseBasicParsing\).Content)

PowerShell($e = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8080/api/employees" -UseBasicParsing\).Content | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Host "Employees count: $\($e.Count\)"; Write-Host "First employee: $\($e[0].fullName\) / $\($e[0].role\)"; $c = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8080/api/correspondences" -UseBasicParsing\).Content | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Host "Correspondences count: $\($c.Count\)"; $d = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8080/api/departments" -UseBasicParsing\).Content | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Host "Departments count: $\($d.Count\)")

PowerShell($s = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8080/api/dashboard/by-status" -UseBasicParsing\).Content; Write-Host "by-status: $s"; $r = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8080/api/dashboard/recent?limit=3" -UseBasicParsing\).Content | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Host "recent count: $\($r.Count\), first subject: $\($r[0].subject\)")

PowerShell($pids = \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8080 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).OwningProcess | Select-Object -Unique; foreach \($p in $pids\) { Stop-Process -Id $p -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Write-Host "Killed PIDs: $pids")
